title: As U.S. bombs Iran, Pope Leo criticizes the idea of a ‘God of war’
summary_full: Some Trump administration officials cloak the war on Iran in religious terms, but the Chicago-born pope said that God “does not listen to the prayers of those who wage war.”
summary_public: Some Trump administration officials cloak the war on Iran in religious terms, but the Chicago-born pope said that God “does not listen to the prayers of those who wage war.”
